summary: Validated a11y fix + design consistency pass (iteration 42). Logged in as admin kirah092804@gmail.com. ALL 12 functional tests passed. CMD+K opens with ZERO accessibility warnings (previous DialogTitle/aria-describedby Radix warnings fully resolved by /app/frontend/src/components/ui/command.jsx adding sr-only DialogTitle + aria-describedby={undefined}). Visual inspection (screenshots) confirmed overline+title pattern on Dashboard (GOOD AFTERNOON / Teacher), Connect (COMMUNITY / Connect), Progress (MY JOURNEY / Progress), Manage (ADMINISTRATION / Manage). pill-tabs class renders with muted bg (rgba 233,231,226,0.6) and active tab has white bg + subtle shadow on all three pages (Connect 2 tabs, Progress 2 tabs, Manage 3 tabs). card-organic resolves correctly: border-radius 24px, box-shadow rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 0 4px 24px, white bg. animate-fade-in applied on all pages. Mobile bottom-nav renders 4 tabs (home/connect/me/manage) and navigation works on 390x844 viewport. All three Manage admin tabs (Members, Attendance, Security) clickable and render content. Zero page errors / zero console errors in session.
passed_tests: CMD+K opens via Ctrl+K shortcut - ZERO DialogTitle/aria-describedby a11y warnings in console
Search input receives focus and debounced queries return results
Dashboard renders overline 'GOOD AFTERNOON' + bold h1 'Teacher' (personalized greeting pattern)
Connect page renders overline 'COMMUNITY' + h1 'Connect' + pill-tabs with 2 tabs (Group Chat active, Direct Messages inactive)
Progress page renders overline 'MY JOURNEY' + h1 'Progress' + pill-tabs with 2 tabs (My Progress, Students)
Manage page renders overline 'ADMINISTRATION' + h1 'Manage' + pill-tabs with 3 tabs (Members, Attendance, Security)
Manage Members / Attendance / Security tabs all clickable and render distinct content (text length 346/252/2420)
pill-tabs background = hsl(muted/0.6) ~ rgba(233,231,226,0.6); active pill = white bg with box-shadow — matches spec
card-organic class resolves: border-radius 24px (rounded-2xl), box-shadow rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 0 4px 24px, white bg — 6 card-organic instances on Manage
animate-fade-in applied on all pages (Dashboard, Connect, Progress, Manage) verified via query
Mobile bottom-nav (390x844): all 4 testids present (bottom-nav-home, bottom-nav-connect, bottom-nav-me, bottom-nav-manage); navigation works for connect/me/manage
critical_code_review_comments: command.jsx: CommandDialog now correctly passes aria-describedby={undefined} and renders <DialogTitle className='sr-only'>Search</DialogTitle> as first child of DialogContent — clean fix, screen-reader accessible and no console warnings.

index.css: card-organic (rounded-2xl + subtle dual-layer shadow) and pill-tabs/pill-tab/pill-tab-active classes are well-defined, dark-mode variants handled. page-container provides consistent 1rem/2rem (md+) horizontal padding.
SearchCommand.jsx: Works correctly but uses a mix of ES5 var/function syntax while the rest of the codebase likely uses const/arrow. Stylistic only — non-blocking.
Mobile bottom-nav for Home uses data-testid='bottom-nav-home' (not 'bottom-nav-dashboard'). Naming is consistent with route '/' so fine, but main agent should be aware if documenting testids.

Note: /me URL redirects to '/' (dashboard) for the admin/teacher account — desktop top-nav 'Me' links to /progress directly. Both flows work; the mobile bottom-nav-me correctly navigates to /progress.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (12/12 functional checks + 0 a11y warnings + 0 page errors)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41's two bugs (/security-log redirect + DialogTitle a11y warning) are both resolved. Design consistency pass (overline+title headers, pill-tabs, card-organic, animate-fade-in, page-container) is visually and programmatically verified on Dashboard/Connect/Progress/Manage for admin role. Desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) both tested. Teacher-role-only manage view (2 tabs: My Group + Attendance) not tested — admin role has 3 tabs instead. Zero console errors encountered.
rca of the issue: N/A — both reported iteration 41 bugs are fixed. DialogTitle fix RCA: /app/frontend/src/components/ui/command.jsx now wraps DialogContent with a sibling <DialogTitle className='sr-only'>Search</DialogTitle> and passes aria-describedby={undefined}, which satisfies Radix Dialog's accessibility requirements without visually showing the title.
